steps.assistant_text: -O0 func with indirect call through struct field (fp = p->0x74). IDO at -O0 uses s0 for a struct pointer variable if declared 'register' — otherwise spills to stack. Body: func_00000000(0); p = arg0->0x28; (*(p->0x74))(p->0x70 + arg0); func_00000000(arg0);. Also inlined the function-pointer deref into the call expression to avoid an extra stack spill.
